title: Stack-Item Relation Definition
description: Defines the role-based relationship between a Stack (country) and an Item. The sovereignty score is calculated from the item's intrinsic sovereigntyCriteria combined with the role multiplier.

role.description: Role of the stack (country) relative to this item. Used as multiplier for sovereignty scoring: maintainer=1.0, contributor=0.75, funder=0.5, consumer=0.25

rationale.description: Localized explanation why this item is in the stack and its sovereignty rating

alternatives.description: Alternative items that could replace this one
